    1. with(String, Object)

Interface MapId

All Superinterfaces:
Map<String, @Nullable Object>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BasicMapId
public interface MapId extends Map<String, @Nullable Object>
Interface that represents the id of a persistent entity, where the keys correspond to the entity's JavaBean properties.
Author:
Matthew T. Adams, Mark Paluch
